positive: A minimalist line art drawing of a steaming cup of coffee viewed through a geometric windowpane. The design should be black ink on a cream background, utilizing negative space effectively. Scandinavian aesthetic, single continuous line drawing, elegant, simple.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, shading, color gradients, clutter, realism, busy
